title: Vercel
html: Stub. Frontend hosting platform used by Rankett for the public marketing site and tool.rankett.com subdomain (CNAMEd to cname.vercel-dns.com per 2025 12 04 screenshot 2025 12 04 at 4 27 45 pm 40ea4b84). Surfaces 404 DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND errors when subdomains aren't provisioned (2026 02 18 screenshot 2026 02 18 at 3 50 41 pm e29c42fa).
